content: Lymph is an important body fluid. Choose the INCORRECT statement about the lymph.

options.content: Fat digested in the intestine is absorbed through the lymph.
It is the interstitial fluid generated by the passage of liquid between the cells of the capillary.
It is colourless and has similar mineral composition as of plasma.
It remains as an interstitial fluid and is never put back into circulation.

explanation: $$ \text { The lymphatic system of vessels drains lymph back to the major veins of the body. } $$
